overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a nighttime exploration of a neon-lit urban market district. The camera follows a character in red clothing through narrow alleys and open plazas filled with digital advertisements, food vendors, and futuristic architecture. The environment transitions from enclosed market passages to a wide open plaza with towering vertical billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with caged vendor stall

events.description: character in red approaches group of three NPCs standing near metal cage structure
character gestures toward NPCs, then turns and walks away down the street

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of NPCs near a caged market stall, engaging in a brief confrontation, then turning to walk away

notable_agents.action: muscular NPC in pink vest standing with arms crossed near the cage structure
NPC in white jacket with blonde hair gesturing during the interaction

entered.detail: tall green pillar with illuminated face advertisement that the camera passes at the start
cylindrical metal cage structure with red lighting serving as a vendor stall
dark building wall with small windows running along the left side of the alley
red and green neon illumination along the left wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow neon-lit alley where the camera follows a character in red approaching three NPCs gathered near a distinctive metal cage stall. After a brief interaction, the character turns and walks away down the alley, passing illuminated advertisements and vendor stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with food stalls and outdoor seating

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wider covered market street with illuminated food vendors
passes by a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the market

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market street, passing rows of food stalls and outdoor dining areas

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in shorts and jacket walking toward the camera then passing by

entered.detail: row of market stalls with illuminated menu boards and fabric awnings
white plastic tables and chairs arranged for dining along the right side
illuminated displays showing food items and prices attached to the stalls
vertical red banner with white text advertising wagyu beef

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the narrow alley into a wider covered market street lined with food stalls on the left and outdoor seating on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the camera passes dining tables and digital menu boards, encountering a pedestrian walking through the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition plaza with planter boxes and benches between market and open square

events.description: exits the covered market into a semi-open plaza with large planter boxes and benches
lighting shifts from neon-dominated to mix of ambient city glow and neon as the sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking through a transitional plaza area with illuminated benches and planters, heading toward the open square ahead

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on an illuminated bench using a mobile device

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters with spiky plants and illuminated orange edges
modern bench with orange cushioning where NPCs are seated
storefront sign with illuminated lettering for a technology shop
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with glass railings

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered market behind, the character enters a semi-open transitional plaza featuring large illuminated planters and modern benches. The environment opens up overhead, revealing an elevated walkway and shifting the lighting from enclosed neon to a mix of ambient city glow. NPCs sit on benches using their devices as the camera moves toward the distant plaza center.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open urban plaza with vertical digital billboards and high-rise buildings

events.description: enters the main open plaza with towering buildings and massive vertical digital billboards overhead
camera slows slightly while approaching the plaza center dominated by prominent vertical Cirlus signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive plaza surrounded by towering digital advertisements and modern skyscrapers, approaching the central area

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screens displaying 'CIRLUS' advertisements in red and blue neon
large illuminated sign with 'COLA' text and beverage imagery on the right building
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the plaza
small illuminated yellow structure with vertical wooden slats on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban plaza dominated by towering digital billboards displaying 'CIRLUS' advertisements and a large 'COLA' sign. The camera moves through the open space surrounded by modern glass skyscrapers and illuminated planters, with a distinctive yellow kiosk on the left. The environment feels expansive and futuristic, with the bright vertical signage contrasting against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban district that gradually expands from a narrow alleyway into a vast, futuristic plaza. It begins by following a character in red through a cramped alley past a metal cage stall and illuminated advertisements before the path widens into a covered market street. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from the enclosed market's wet pavement and food stalls toward a semi-open transitional plaza featuring large planters and an elevated walkway overhead. The scene then opens fully into an expansive urban square dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards for Circlus and Cola. Finally, the camera glides through this wide-open space, passing a yellow kiosk under the bright glow of vertical signage against the night sky.
